sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, value Nullable(String), created_at DateTime) ENGINE=Log;
SELECT any(value) AS first_value, any(created_at) AS first_time FROM test_table WHERE id > 0 GROUP BY id HAVING first_value IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE another_table (category String, amount Float64) ENGINE=Log;
INSERT INTO another_table (category, amount) VALUES ('A', 100.0), ('B', NULL), ('C', 200.0), ('D', 150.5);
SELECT category, any(amount) AS total_amount FROM another_table GROUP BY category HAVING total_amount > 100;
CREATE TABLE complex_table (cust_id Int32, purchase_date DateTime, amount Float32) ENGINE=Log;
SELECT cust_id, any(amount) AS total_amount FROM complex_table GROUP BY cust_id HAVING total_amount > (SELECT any(amount) FROM complex_table WHERE amount IS NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE join_table1 (key1 Int32, value1 String) ENGINE=Log;
CREATE TABLE join_table2 (key2 Int32, value2 Nullable(Int32)) ENGINE=Log;
INSERT INTO join_table1 (key1, value1) VALUES (1, 'X'), (2, 'Y'), (3, 'Z');
INSERT INTO join_table2 (key2, value2) VALUES (1, 10), (2, NULL), (3, 15);

SELECT jt1.key1, any(jt1.value1) AS first_value, any(jt2.value2) AS first_numeric FROM join_table1 jt1 LEFT JOIN join_table2 jt2 ON jt1.key1 = jt2.key2 GROUP BY jt1.key1 HAVING first_numeric IS NOT NULL OR first_value IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE edge_case_table (record_id Int32, description Nullable(String), score Float32) ENGINE=Log;
INSERT INTO edge_case_table (record_id, description, score) VALUES (1, 'Edge case with NULL', NULL), (2, 'Normal scenario', 95.5), (3, 'Another edge case', NULL);
SELECT any(description) AS desc_first, any(score) AS score_first FROM edge_case_table GROUP BY record_id HAVING score_first IS NULL;
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT * FROM test_table LIMIT 0;
INSERT INTO temp_table SELECT id, value, created_at FROM test_table WHERE created_at > '2023-01-01 00:00:00' AND value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT any(value OR 'default') AS combined_value FROM temp_table;
CREATE TABLE type_cast_table (num_field Int32, str_field String) ENGINE=Log;
INSERT INTO type_cast_table (num_field, str_field) VALUES (1, '1'), (2, '2'), (NULL, '3'), (4, '4');
SELECT any(num_field + toInt32(str_field)) AS aggressive_cast, multiIf(num_field IS NULL, 'Null case', 1 > 0, 'Positive case', 'Unknown') AS case_description FROM type_cast_table GROUP BY num_field;
CREATE TABLE final_test_table (test_id Int32, test_value Nullable(String)) ENGINE=Log;
INSERT INTO final_test_table (test_id, test_value) VALUES (1, NULL), (2, 'Hello'), (3, 'World');
SELECT any(test_value) AS first_string, multiIf(test_value IS NULL, 'No Value', 'Has Value') AS value_status FROM final_test_table GROUP BY test_id;
